title: ormenis nobilis subsp. aurea
intro: Ormenis nobilis subsp. aurea, also known as the Golden Chamomile, is a subspecies of the Ormenis nobilis plant, characterized by its bright yellow flowers. It has been used in traditional medicine for its calming and soothing properties, with medicinal properties attributed to its essential oils, which contain chamazulene and other flavonoids. The health benefits of Golden Chamomile include its ability to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating skin issues and digestive problems. Golden Chamomile can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use, with its flowers often dried and used in skincare products and other herbal preparations.
